message:
feat(freeze): Add check_brand opcode Zig support

Convert check_brand opcode to support both C and Zig output.
This opcode verifies that an object has a brand for private field access.

Stack effect: [obj, func] -> [obj, func] (no change, throws on error)

Implementation:
- Checks brand on object at sp-2 with func at sp-1
- Calls JS_FrozenCheckBrand helper function
- Returns exception if check fails
- In Zig: returns qjs.JS_EXCEPTION directly
- In C: uses FROZEN_EXIT_STACK() macro before return
